title: Density vs Breach Mace
description: Easily tell apart Density and Breach enchants on your mace with this pack!
body:
## Density vs Breach Visuals

This Pack changes the textures of the mace, dependant on the enchant which is on it.

Useful for Mace PvP on PvP servers and SMPs (when you have both of them)

There is no Mod required to work, all Vanilla

 My [Discord](https://discord.gg/eTfBJZKb9v) if you have any questions or suggestions for improvement :D

 Also have a look at my other projects, e.g. Silktouch and Fortune Pack which does the same as this mace one but for pickaxes.
